title: Garnotia barbulata
taxonomy: Garnotia barbulata is classified within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Andropogoneae and is placed within the subfamily Panicoideae. The species is further categorized within the genus Garnotia. Garnotia barbulata is native to Southeast Asia and has been classified based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships. As part of its classification, Garnotia barbulata is also known by its synonyms, which include various regional names.
uses: Garnotia barbulata is a plant species found in various parts of Asia, and research on its medicinal properties is ongoing.
